findings.description: Knowledge file describes buildTagList() as receiving only the thrown exception (with null if none), but omits that it also receives the handler input parameters (TData param) and the subsequent handler's execution result (TResult tResult). The source explicitly states '本メソッドは必要に応じてこれらの情報を参照し' — all three inputs are available for tag construction. The return type `List<io.micrometer.core.instrument.Tag>` is also not stated.
findings.source_evidence: `buildTagList()` には、ハンドラに渡されたパラメータと後続ハンドラの実行結果、そして後続ハンドラがスローした例外が渡される（例外がスローされていない場合は `null`）。本メソッドは必要に応じてこれらの情報を参照し、メトリクスに設定するタグの一覧を `List<io.micrometer.core.instrument.Tag>` で返すように実装する。

findings.location: timer-metrics-handler — HTTPリクエストの処理時間を収集する subsection
findings.description: The source includes a concrete `LoggingMeterRegistry` text output example showing the actual format of collected `http.server.requests` metrics (metric name, all tag keys/values, throughput, mean, max). This is omitted from the knowledge file. Users asking 'how does the output look?' cannot be answered precisely.

findings.location: timer-metrics-handler — パーセンタイルを収集する subsection
findings.description: The source includes a large concrete text output example showing the actual `http_server_requests_seconds` quantile metrics and `http_server_requests_seconds_bucket` histogram bucket entries produced when percentile collection is configured. This demonstrates the actual metric naming format and structure, which is useful for AI to answer questions about what metrics are generated. It is entirely omitted from the knowledge file.

The source includes a concrete `LoggingMeterRegistry` text output example showing what batch transaction time metrics look like, including the metric name format, class tag, throughput, mean, and max values. This is omitted from the knowledge file.
Knowledge file adds 'ネイティブで' (natively) when describing Prometheus support for histogram-based percentile calculation. The source simply states Prometheus 'サポートしている' without the qualifier 'ネイティブで'.
findings.source_evidence: Prometheus(外部サイト、英語) は、ヒストグラムによるパーセンタイルの計算をサポートしている

findings.description: The source h2 section '処理時間を計測するハンドラ' contains multiple h3 subsections (パーセンタイルを収集する, あらかじめ用意されているHandlerMetricsMetaDataBuilderの実装) and an h4 (HTTPリクエストの処理時間を収集する). The combined plain text content is well over 2000 characters, yet all subsections are merged into a single knowledge section. Splitting at h3 (e.g., a separate section for percentile configuration and for HttpRequestTimeMetricsMetaDataBuilder) would improve retrievability.
findings.source_evidence: h3: パーセンタイルを収集する (~~~~~~~~~~~~); h3: あらかじめ用意されているHandlerMetricsMetaDataBuilderの実装 (~~~~~~~~~~~~); h4: HTTPリクエストの処理時間を収集する (*****)

findings.description: Missing hints: `http.server.requests` (the metric name used by HttpRequestTimeMetricsMetaDataBuilder — a key search term for users looking up HTTP metrics), `LoggingMeterRegistry` (referenced in output examples in both percentile and HTTP sections).
findings.source_evidence: 本クラスは、メトリクスの名前に ``http.server.requests`` を使用する。 / 2020-10-06 13:52:10.309 [INFO ] i.m.c.i.l.LoggingMeterRegistry: ...

findings.description: Missing hints: `increment` (the CommitLogger method whose call interval is measured — central to understanding the mechanism), `LoggingMeterRegistry` (referenced in the batch output example).
findings.source_evidence: `increment(long)` の呼び出し間隔を計測することでトランザクション単位の時間を計測している / 情報: batch.transaction.time{class=MetricsTestAction} ...
